entries.title: Stripe-Backed Tempo Expands Into Lending With Morpho Integration
entries.snippet: Tempo is expanding its push into institutional stablecoin infrastructure by adding decentralized lending and yield capabilities to its blockchain. entries.title: SEC to propose tokenized stock framework as Wall Street efforts deepen

entries.snippet: The Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) and the Bank of England on Monday (May 18) issued a joint framework to accelerate tokenization within the U.K.’s wholesale financial markets. The initiative seeks to provide the regulatory and technical certainty institutional firms require to transition digital

entries.title: Minnesota legalizes crypto custody services for banks, credit unions
entries.snippet: Minnesota-based banking institutions and credit unions will be authorized to provide digital asset custody services in a nonfiduciary capacity as of Aug. 1.

entries.title: Revolut unveils first physical crypto card as industry-wide card usage grows
entries.snippet: The card will be usable anywhere Visa and Mastercard are accepted, and will first roll out firm in the UK and EEA.
entries.tweet_text: @RevolutApp unveils first physical crypto card as industry-wide card usage grows

entries.title: UK proposes near-24/7 settlement to prepare markets for tokenization
entries.snippet: The FCA and Bank of England are seeking feedback on new tokenization guidance and plans to extend operating hours for the UK’s core payment and settlement infrastructure toward near-24/7 availability.
entries.tweet_text: UK proposes near-24/7 settlement to prepare markets for tokenization

entries.title: Standard Chartered projects $4T in tokenized assets by end-2028, with DeFi protocols primary beneficiaries
entries.snippet: Standard Chartered projects $4 trillion in tokenized assets by the end of 2028, with DeFi protocols positioned to benefit most.

entries.title: Digital Assets Clearing Center secures $10 million investment
entries.snippet: Digital Asset Clearing Center (DACC.HK), a next-generation financial market infrastructure for the tokenized economy, today announced US$10 million in funding from strategic partners including Conflux, Transaction Technologies Limited (“TTL”) and Global InfoTech.

entries.title: AFX launches sovereign Layer 1, providing an optimized execution environment for on-chain perp DEXes
entries.snippet: AFX, a sovereign Layer 1 purpose-built for decentralized derivatives trading, has officially commenced the operation of its L1 Mainnet, signaling a definitive end to the era of trade execution compromised by general-purpose blockchain congestion.

entries.title: Grayscale, VanEck amend US spot BNB ETF filings, stepping closer to a potential launch
entries.snippet: The US securities regulator approved 21Shares’ Hyperliquid ETF last week, adding to a growing number of cryptocurrencies converted into ETF wrappers in the US.

entries.title: KuCoin Australia's 'Evolution' Showcases Regulatory Focus, Mastercard Launch
entries.snippet: The exchange’s KuCard rollout enables users to make "seamless payments" to Mastercard merchants using USDC.
entries.tweet_text: KuCoin Australia's 'Evolution' Showcases Regulatory Focus, @Mastercard Launch

entries.title: SBI, Rakuten, Nomura line up to launch crypto investment trusts: Report
entries.snippet: Japan’s biggest brokerages are racing to bring crypto investment trusts to retail investors, as regulators move to formally allow crypto-holding funds by 2028.

entries.title: Augustus CEO says banks can't rebuild for AI and stablecoins
entries.snippet: Augustus Bank CEO Ferdinand Dabitz says legacy clearing banks can’t be rebuilt for AI after the OCC grants conditional approval for its stablecoin-focused US bank push.

entries.title: Poland passes MiCA crypto bill as $96 million Zondacrypto probe deepens
entries.snippet: Polish lawmakers adopted MiCA as prosecutors probe $96 million in losses from collapsed exchange Zondacrypto.

entries.title: Forward Industries posts over 300% revenue growth but wider quarterly net loss amid SOL markdowns
entries.snippet: The Solana treasury firm generated $13 million in revenue for the quarter ended March 31, up 319% year over year.

Tezos launches quantum-resistant private payments prototype on testnet
entries.snippet: The testnet system uses post-quantum cryptography and zk-STARK proofs to protect encrypted transaction data from future quantum computing attacks.

entries.snippet: Neobank Fasset has raised $51 million to expand its stablecoin-centric banking platform to emerging markets. entries.title: Bank of England to soften plans for stablecoin restrictions
entries.snippet: The Bank of England look set to ease planned stablecoin restrictions in the face of industry pushback, according to the Financial Times.

entries.title: Sharplink CEO says ETH treasury firms are diverging from Strategy model as Ethereum's tokenization role expands
entries.snippet: Joseph Chalom said growing institutional adoption of tokenization could strengthen Ethereum's role as infrastructure for onchain assets.

entries.title: Digital Prime Technologies launches digital asset lending platform
entries.snippet: Digital Prime Technologies, a provider of digital asset technology solutions, today announced the launch of Tokenet, its institutional digital asset lending platform, with the first trades now successfully executed on the platform.

entries.title: CoinList expands into tokenized asset distribution with 'Passage' as token sales slow
entries.snippet: CoinList has launched Passage. The move marks its expansion beyond token sales, which have slowed across the crypto industry in recent years.

entries.title: CME sets June 8 for Nasdaq-backed crypto index futures covering seven assets in first weighted contract
entries.snippet: CME Group to launch Nasdaq CME Crypto Index futures June 8 — its first market-cap-weighted crypto contract covering BTC and six other assets.

entries.title: Upshift rolls out new vault platform providing bridging capital for instant RWA redemptions
entries.snippet: Dedicated USDC vaults will provide instant liquidity to RWA holders when they want to redeem, with LPs earning redemption fees.

entries.title: Tether's T3 Crime Unit says it has frozen $450M in suspected illicit crypto

entries.title: Coinbase becomes Hyperliquid's official USDC treasury deployer as USDH sunsets

entries.snippet: Chainlink Runtime Environment enables Myriad to deploy a new range of prediction markets with immediate settlement.

entries.title: Societe Generale deploys stablecoins on Canton for tokenized finance
entries.snippet: France's SocGen plans to use its EURCV and USDCV stablecoins for tokenized collateral, repo financing and institutional settlement activity on the Canton blockchain network.

entries.title: Paybis secures MiCA and payment licenses in Latvia for EU crypto expansion
entries.snippet: Paybis has secured both a MiCA crypto licence and a PSD2 payment institution licence from Latvia’s central bank, becoming the first company in the country to hold both simultaneously.

Vietnam eyes Q3 launch for regulated crypto asset market: Report
entries.snippet: Vietnam’s deputy minister of finance reportedly said the country is planning to launch its regulated cryptocurrency market in the third quarter of 2026 to answer the growing demand for digital assets.

entries.snippet: Korean won-denominated stablecoin KRWQ is expanding to Solana to support Korean won liquidity onchain.

entries.title: Upexi falls 8% after widened fiscal Q3 net loss
entries.snippet: Upexi increased its Solana holdings to 2.5 million, valued at more than $238 million, making it the second-largest listed corporate Solana treasury, behind Forward Industries.

entries.title: First-ever Hyperliquid ETF launches, posts 'very solid' first day of trading: analyst
entries.snippet: Investors buying shares in the instrument gain exposure to the HYPE token without having to own the cryptocurrency.

entries.snippet: The new portal lets LMAX clients deposit digital assets into custody and use them as collateral to trade FX, metals, CFDs, perpetual futures and crypto.
